response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and modern tooling, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His leadership and mentoring experience is present but not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps engineers, which are key for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and mentoring across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded).
Proven track record of leading open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and establishing engineering best practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Diverse technical background with exposure to distributed systems, real-time data processing, and DevOps tooling.
concerns: Only limited and outdated C++ experience (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit experience with cloud compute platforms or production-level cloud architecture (AWS/Azure/GCP at scale).
Technical leadership roles are not clearly aligned with mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers, a preferred qualification.
